name: work-this-way
description: Visible, composable controls for how an agent works in the current session.

interface.shortDescription: Set visible session controls for agent work.
interface.longDescription: Activate, qualify, clear, and obey composable HACP controls such as READ ONLY, ASK FIRST, LOCAL ONLY, and EVIDENCE REQUIRED.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Work This Way to control how you work in this session.
